name: Creamy Sweet Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Sweet potatoes (cooked, peeled and cubed)
1/2 cup Sweet red pepper OR green
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine mayonnaise, buttermilk, lemon juice, mustard, and sugar. Mix until smooth.
2. In a large bowl, mix sweet potatoes, peas, red pepper or green pepper, and sliced onions.
3. Pour the dressing over the vegetables and toss to coat evenly.
4. Refrigerate for at least two hours or overnight.
5. Serve in a large brown-lined dish, topped with cooked bacon.
